title: eucryphia × hillieri
intro: Eucryphia × hillieri, a hybrid plant species, is a cross between Eucryphia lucida and Eucryphia cordifolia, both native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in New Zealand, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and flowers of Eucryphia × hillieri have been reported to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Eucryphia × hillieri can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions.
